ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Permission.Bypass_Validation_Rules), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Live_Training', ISPICKVAL(Training_Stage__c, "On Hold"), ISPICKVAL(On_Hold_Reason__c, "Other"), ISBLANK(On_Hold_Comments__c) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please add On Hold Comments for selecting Other to save the record.
